attributes.action: No UK involvement in yet another illegal war in the Middle East. Never Again !
attributes.additional_details: I want to make this petition as I feel there is not enough movement from the people of the UK to  have their say on this war , after all it effects everyone . the people of the UK should not be dragged into another illegal war. The current conflict with Iran risks devastating consequences and has been widely criticised as illegal under international law. Britain must stand for peace, refuse involvement, and push for diplomacy instead of war.
attributes.background:
Not to join in yet another illegal war of aggression" to demand parliamentary approval for any use of British military bases in the conflict. Not to make 
Britain complicit in a wider conflict by allowing US forces to use British bases to bomb Iran 
to follow the example of Spain,

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
